nasb.text: When the Jews who lived near them came and told us ten times, “They will come up against us from every place where you may turn,”

esv.text: At that time the Jews who lived near them came from all directions and said to us ten times, “You must return to us.”

cnv.text: 住在他們附近的一些猶大人，也曾十次前來通知我們說：“他們將從各方上來攻擊你們。”

ccb.text: 靠近敌人居住的犹太人十次来告诉我们，说敌人会从各方来袭击我们。
